base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of lemmy_wendy — a character (boss) from 1990 super mario world. Lemmy + Wendy Koopalings (World 3 + 2 castles). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
